name: DICK'S SPORTING GOODS, INC.
summary: PART I General DICKS Sporting Goods, Inc. (together with its subsidiaries, referred to as the Company, we, us and our unless specified otherwise) is a leading global sports retailer offering an extensive assortment of authentic, high-quality sports equipment, apparel, footwear and accessories.
